metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace

columns.name: AppDisplayName
columns.description: Display name of the app registration

columns.name: AppId
columns.description: Application (client) ID of the app registration

columns.name: ObjectId
columns.description: Object ID of the app registration

columns.name: CredentialType
columns.description: Type of credential: Secret or Certificate

columns.name: CredentialId
columns.description: Key ID of the secret or certificate

columns.name: CredentialDisplayName
columns.description: Display name of the secret or certificate

columns.name: DaysUntilExpiry
columns.description: Number of days until the credential expires (negative if already expired)

columns.name: CheckTimestamp
columns.description: Timestamp when the check was performed

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Time the record was ingested (required for custom tables)
